evidence: Pi SDK Anthropic default/fallback model id; verified in the installed SDK model resolver and local ~/.pi/agent/settings.json.
AIPI beta default binds every class to a concrete Anthropic model; override with AIPI_MODEL_CLASS_* or .aipi/model-capabilities.json when a cheaper/faster class-specific model is available.

rule: Classes must bind to concrete provider/model selections and models must carry capability evidence. AIPI treats missing mappings or missing capabilities as a readiness blocker before beta/adversarial-review claims. Defaults are overridable by AIPI_MODEL_CLASS_* env vars and project .aipi/model-capabilities.json.
